It’s great to be back in Edinburgh for our Party Conference. Now, the last time I was Edinburgh, I was just down the road with Russell and Kemi. Sipping common sense Conservative whisky cocktails in the shadow of Edinburgh Castle, as the sun set on a beautiful winter day... You might remember the day. It...
